ValidationRule.description: Rule restricts users on external profiles from being added as Deal Reps
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( leaseworks__Marketing_Representative_User__r.Profile.Name <> "Carlyle Commercial", leaseworks__Marketing_Representative_User__r.Profile.Name <> "Compliance", leaseworks__Marketing_Representative_User__r.Profile.Name <> "Contracts", leaseworks__Marketing_Representative_User__r.Profile.Name <> "Credit", leaseworks__Marketing_Representative_User__r.Profile.Name <> "Executive", leaseworks__Marketing_Representative_User__r.Profile.Name <> "Finance", leaseworks__Marketing_Representative_User__r.Profile.Name <> "Investment & Strategy", leaseworks__Marketing_Representative_User__r.Profile.Name <> "Lease Management", leaseworks__Marketing_Representative_User__r.Profile.Name <> "Legal", leaseworks__Marketing_Representative_User__r.Profile.Name <> "System Administrator", leaseworks__Marketing_Representative_User__r.Profile.Name <> "Technical Admin", leaseworks__Marketing_Representative_User__r.Profile.Name <> "Technical User" )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Invalid Deal Rep selected. Please choose a user from Carlyle’s internal team.
